name: Group or Account Discovery
notes: This rule triggers when command related to group or account discovery is detected.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches "Process Name" IMATCHES 'whoami\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches "Command" IMATCHES '.*whoami(\.exe)?\s*\/groups.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Group or Account Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches "Process Name" IMATCHES 'whoami\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches "Command" IMATCHES '.*whoami(\.exe)?\s*\/groups.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Whoami /groups Has Been Executed
Event description: Whoami /groups Has Been Executed
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
